title: Condition-based waiting utilities for thread event monitoring
purpose: Provides reliable asynchronous waiting mechanisms for specific thread events, replacing flaky arbitrary timeouts with condition-based checks.

methods.name: waitForEvent
methods.normalized_params: (threadManager: ThreadManager, threadId: string, eventType: LaceEventType, timeoutMs?: number): Promise<LaceEvent>

steps.content: Initialize a promise that will resolve when the specified event type is found.
Start tracking the elapsed time from when the check begins.
Define a polling function that checks for the event in the thread manager.
IF the event is found, resolve the promise with the matching event.
ELSE IF the timeout has been exceeded, reject the promise with a timeout error.
ELSE schedule another check after a short delay to avoid excessive polling.

methods.name: waitForEventCount
methods.normalized_params: (threadManager: ThreadManager, threadId: string, eventType: LaceEventType, count: number, timeoutMs?: number): Promise<LaceEvent[]>

steps.content: Initialize a promise that will resolve when the specified number of events are found.
Start tracking the elapsed time from when the check begins.
Define a polling function that checks for the required number of matching events.
IF the required number of events is found, resolve the promise with the matching events.
ELSE IF the timeout has been exceeded, reject the promise with a timeout error.
ELSE schedule another check after a short delay to avoid excessive polling.

methods.name: waitForEventMatch
methods.normalized_params: (threadManager: ThreadManager, threadId: string, predicate: (event: LaceEvent) => boolean, description: string, timeoutMs?: number): Promise<LaceEvent>

steps.content: Initialize a promise that will resolve when an event matching the predicate is found.
Start tracking the elapsed time from when the check begins.
Define a polling function that checks for events matching the predicate.
IF a matching event is found, resolve the promise with that event.
ELSE IF the timeout has been exceeded, reject the promise with a timeout error.
ELSE schedule another check after a short delay to avoid excessive polling.
